title: chown: changing ownership of '/var/lib/postgresql/data': Invalid argument
body:
/kind bug

**Description**
Running docker.io/postgres fails on fresh centOS 8, it works in fedora 33 though.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. podman run --name pgsql_test -dt -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres docker.io/library/postgres:latest;
2.  podman logs -f pgsql_test

**Describe the results you received:**
chown: changing ownership of '/var/lib/postgresql/data': Invalid argument

**Describe the results you expected:**
postgreSQL container running

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Doesn't work in centOS 8 but works in fedora 33

**Output of `podman version`:**
```
Version:      2.1.1
API Version:  2.0.0
Go Version:   go1.13.15
Built:        Fri Oct 30 23:23:30 2020
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body:
there are not enough IDs available in the user namespace.

Can you check whether the rootless user is present in the `/etc/subuid` and `/etc/subgid` files?

```bash
[gitlab-runner@staging_rc ~]$ cat /etc/subuid
centos:100000:65536
gitlab-runner:200000:65536
[gitlab-runner@staging_rc ~]$ cat /etc/subgid
centos:100000:65536
gitlab-runner:200000:65536
[gitlab-runner@staging_rc ~]$ 
[gitlab-runner@staging_rc ~]$ podman pull registry.redhat.io/rhel8/postgresql-10
Trying to pull registry.redhat.io/rhel8/postgresql-10...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 2207445355df done  
Copying blob 0c7bc3c1e1a3 done  
Copying blob 1b8dabac56ed done  
Copying blob 6500ac87b29f done  
Copying config 46048be0c7 done  
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
  Error processing tar file(exit status 1): there might not be enough IDs available in the namespace (requested 0:81 for /usr/libexec/dbus-1/dbus-daemon-launch-helper): lchown /usr/libexec/dbus-1/dbus-daemon-launch-helper: invalid argument
Error: unable to pull registry.redhat.io/rhel8/postgresql-10: Error committing the finished image: error adding layer with blob "sha256:1b8dabac56ed728c17a670d327474ab87dc392dc17721854ea599a7753326579": Error processing tar file(exit status 1): there might not be enough IDs available in the namespace (requested 0:81 for /usr/libexec/dbus-1/dbus-daemon-launch-helper): lchown /usr/libexec/dbus-1/dbus-daemon-launch-helper: invalid argument
```

Yes, trying with another image says that I lack ids, though, my subuid / subgid files are good aren't they ?

oh nvm I had to run : ```podman system migrate``` so that my sub IDs get taken into account.
Problem solved, ty.
